scripts.check: npm run check:repository && npm run check:dependencies && npm run check:syntax && npm run check:modules && npm run coverage && npm run lint && npm run check:duplicates && npm run check:bannerbuilder && npm run check:platform && npm run check:assets && npm run check:shared
scripts.check:platform: node scripts/check-platform-manifest.mjs && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/check-local-backend-config.ps1 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/check-local-backend-environment.ps1 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/check-local-process-ownership.ps1
scripts.check:syntax: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/check-javascript-syntax.ps1 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/check-powershell-syntax.ps1
